What this report does not prove

  • This is a single run (n=1) — no confidence intervals, no statistical significance.
  • This run includes 1 judge dimension(s) (instruction-adherence) — judge scoring is advisory and uncalibrated; v1 has no calibration stage.
  • The model identity in this report is self-reported by the coordinator (model.source = "self-report") — not read from a deterministic harness source.
  • Reproducibility here means an evidence + scoring replay via --verify — never a claim of deterministic model outputs.
